scope: current live bot strategy backtests, not Model B residual research
model_b_status: stopped_no_trade; not used in this backtest
data_notes: Backtests use historical local data_v2 snapshots/book_ticks and markets.yaml mappings.
backtest_value_engine.py was patched to skip 0-byte parquet files instead of failing.
decisive_swing_pnl.py was patched only for current loader/schema compatibility.
No live trading, calibration, threshold optimization, locked audit, or Model B training was run.

interpretation.value_bot: Positive in the current historical replay, but sample is small: 18 trades without confirmation and 5 with confirmation.
interpretation.decisive_swing: Best observed ROI at lower decisive thresholds, but uses an optimistic half-spread assumption and a small tradeable sample.
do_not_infer: Do not use these results to advance Model B.
Do not run locked audit or live trading from this report alone.
Do not treat ROI as stable because samples are small and book coverage is limited.
